title: Kalai-II Hydro Electric Project
description: Source: PIB Subject: Geography Context: The Cabinet Committee on Economic Affairs approved a massive investment of ₹14,105.83 crore for the construction of the 1200 MW Kalai-II Hydro Electric Project in Arunachal Pradesh.
